underlying_goal: Build and enrich a JSON catalog of classical music composers and works with metadata from Wikidata, Wikipedia, Apple Music Classical, and local PDMX corpus files for an iOS app
friction_detail: Indentation got messed up during edits, DNS rate limiting hit during Apple Classical scraping, and background tasks interfered with each other.
brief_summary: User iteratively built and enriched a classical music catalog with pageviews, Apple Classical links, and MIDI file matching; Claude implemented all features successfully despite some rate limiting and merge issues.
